  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

GAZ3000 AB40-AB54 (KWP2000) V1

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 79
Func Name: GPL

Requests

[
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "replybytes": "700201",
    "sentbytes": "3002000A",
    "name": "Output Control",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Nombre de cycle de pilotage": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Output Control Command": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Output Temporary Control List": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Output Control Status": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 3,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "310100",
    "name": "Routines Activation",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine Entry Options": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Routines à activer": {
        "firstbyte": 2,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Routine Entry Status": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "320100",
    "name": "Routines Stopping",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Routines à stopper": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "sentbytes": "10C0",
    "name": "Start Diagnostic Session",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "Session Name": {
        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 38,
    "sentbytes": "21A0",
    "name": "Trame 01 - Etats et Paramètres",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Autorisation calcul de la température gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Configuration capteur de température aval gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Configuration monocarburation": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Consigne de débit gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 14,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Consigne de fonctionnement gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Consigne essence": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Consigne gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Défaut grave système gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Défaut mineur système gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Demande activation système gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Demande désactivation système gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETAIN": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETALOG1": {
        "firstbyte": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETALOG2": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETAMOD3": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETAMOD4": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "ref": true
      },
      "ETAOUT": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat de la demande client gaz": {
        "firstbyte": 10,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat de l'électrovanne détendeur": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat de sortie de la led": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 3,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat de sortie du voyant": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat du relais de coupure pompe à essence": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Etat du relais général (EV réservoir)": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Mode de fonctionnement moteur": {
        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },

        "ref": true
      },

        "ref": true

        "ref": true
      },

      },

        "firstbyte": 7,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 2,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Nombre de départ essence usine": {
        "firstbyte": 13,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Power latch en cours": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 1,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Pression collecteur": {
        "firstbyte": 16,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "firstbyte": 18,
        "ref": true,

      },

        "ref": true,

        "bitoffset": 5,
        "ref": true

        "bitoffset": 4,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 10,

        "ref": true

        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "ref": true,

      },

        "ref": true,

      },

        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Etat électrovanne rampe (not used)": {
        "firstbyte": 4,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Entrée analogique de jaugeage activée": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Entrée analogique utilisée pour le jaugeage": {
        "firstbyte": 6,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Tension d'alimentation capteurs": {
        "firstbyte": 27,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"

        "firstbyte": 29,
        "ref": true,

        "firstbyte": 6,
        "ref": true

  {
    "minbytes": 31,
    "sentbytes": "21A1",
    "name": "Trame 02 - Pannes",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "FLGECM1": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true
      },
      "FLGECO": {
        "firstbyte": 11,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 31,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne présente tension réservoir en CO ou en CC+": {
        "firstbyte": 31,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne mémorisée tension réservoir en CO ou en CC+": {
        "firstbyte": 31,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne présente tension réservoir en CO ou en CC-": {
        "firstbyte": 30,
        "bitoffset": 7,
        "ref": true
      },
      "Panne mémorisée tension réservoir en CO ou en CC-": {
        "firstbyte": 30,
        "bitoffset": 6,
        "ref": true
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 26,
    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "Trame Identification",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Numéro de calibration": {
        "firstbyte": 21,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Numéro de calibration mise au point": {
        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Numéro de fournisseur": {
        "firstbyte": 9,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Numéro de hardware": {
        "firstbyte": 12,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Numéro de version logiciel": {
        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Numéro diagnostic": {
        "firstbyte": 8,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Numéro du programme": {
        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Numéro RENAULT du calculateur": {
        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Reserve trame ident": {
        "firstbyte": 24,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      },
      "Manufacturer Identification Code": {
        "firstbyte": 26,
        "ref": true,
        "endian": "Big"
      }
    }
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "replybytes": "57",
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],

        "endian": "Big"
      },

        "bitoffset": 3,

  },
